visualizerParams.title: Binary Step Boundary Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The binary step function is supposed to return 1 for inputs that are 0 or greater. However, it seems to be failing for the exact zero case. Find and fix the boundary condition.

solution.explanation: By definition, the binary step function activates (returns 1) when the input is greater than OR EQUAL to 0. The buggy code used a strict inequality `> 0`, which incorrectly returned 0 for an input of exactly 0.
